spanish: Se iba retrasando más y más hasta las cuatro o cinco de la tarde.
english: It kept getting more and more delayed until four or five in the afternoon.
explanation: Imperfect progressive (iba + gerund) - describes an ongoing action in the past that continued over time
Pluperfect/past perfect (habías + past participle) - action completed before another past action

spanish: Era una obra importante para que ellos se formaran espiritualmente.
english: It was an important work for them to form themselves spiritually.
explanation: Imperfect subjunctive (se formaran) after 'para que' - expresses purpose in the past
